Petition For Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To May-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jackson Morris for Diane Dvisser and Darcie Jaquez.

Mr. Morris requested until May 9, 2011 to file the Petition to Appoint Successor Co-Trustee. The matter was continued to May 9, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Counsel that he needed verification from his two Clients on the petition and on the waiver of bond.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
